title: After 3rd Impact
wikitext:
[]: After 3rd Impact?             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jun 23, 2004 4:07 pm Has ther ever been a concensus on whether just the area of lilith's egg was turned into another dead sea or is the whole world now like that.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jun 23, 2004 4:26 pm well i think it depends on how u view the ending. if u think Asuka and Shinji are the last humans alive then everyone in the entire wolrd was turned into LCL meaning the sea of LCL might span across the globe or a good part of it. and then thinking how large Rei was, probably half or most of the earth got owned, but i bet there are some places that were left intact.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 23, 2004 5:04 pm I've had some difficulty with this. You don't get to see what happened to the rest of the world. You know that pretty much all of Tokyo-3 was devastated by Unit-00's self destruction, but we don't know if the absolute destruction was limited to that area. Some say that the rest of the world is undamaged. However, I have to wonder. When you see the wave of souls released across the planet, you see hordes of green crosses (similar to sachiel's explosion) rising up from the Earth. If that isn't simply there to "look cool", you have to ask yourself, "What are those crosses?". Because they simply aren't human souls, and there's nothing to suggest what they might be. Many people fear nuclear weapons because of the fact that there are thousands of warheads in existance with enough destructive force to completely destroy the physical face of the planet several times over. That may be exagerated, but that is still a chilling factor to consider. That reminds me of the End of Eva. What if those green crosses are actually angel's being destroyed/complemented/released/etc? What if those green crosses are the remaining successors of the white moon being destroyed. Humanity prevailed, and its possible that the spawn of Adam were destroyed as a consequence. There are some who will disagree with me, but I would like others to consider that there were more Angels in existance, and they may have all been destroyed, and their release wreaked destruction upon the face of the planet, and its possible that the devastation is not limited to Tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jun 23, 2004 5:53 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: That reminds me of the End of Eva. What if those green crosses are actually angel's being destroyed/complemented/released/etc? What if those green crosses are the remaining successors of the white moon being destroyed. Humanity prevailed, and its possible that the spawn of Adam were destroyed as a consequence. There are some who will disagree with me, but I would like others to consider that there were more Angels in existance, and they may have all been destroyed, and their release wreaked destruction upon the face of the planet, and its possible that the devastation is not limited to Tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jun 23, 2004 6:09 pm I can see both sides of those answers, but I am a little intrigued with EVA Monkey's idea of them being remaining angles. I was never really sold on the idea of Seele having all the answers, and often wondered if the angels themselves were manipulating them (while watching some of the later episodes this thought often popped into my head). So just because the dead sea scrolls said there were only so many angels should we believe this, and not question if there were more?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jun 23, 2004 6:38 pm intriguing Hunter21. it is a little odd that karou appeared so suddenly but yet it seemed SEELE controlled him. had karou grown up like a normal human or was he born "matured" like the other angels, ready for destruction and if one angel appears human, why not another.

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Wed Jun 23, 2004 6:50 pm I may be completly wrong about this but, I remember hearing from somewhere that humanity was supposed to be the last angel, or something to that extent. If Im wrong Ill just drop it now.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jun 23, 2004 7:08 pm Actually you are correct, that was said, but I think it was said by seele (please correct me if I'm wrong).

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Wed Jun 23, 2004 7:24 pm That thing about humanity being the 18th angel was said by Misato (i don't know if someone else said that). That's no official statement, is just something that Misato said. That's part of all the discussion about lilith beign the 2nd angel or not, or if Rei is an angel, etc, etc. At the end we all are of the same nature, the numbers were made in the order of aparitions of this giant monsters we call angels. About the crosses, they show up in the series when: 1-Explosions made by angels 2-Explosion made by Eva-02 in EoE The crosses are not human souls, because at that time souls are all that cloud made by red dots. I thinks the crosses are just there to look cool. But what the Eva Monkey said about the angels is very nice also. I'm curious about something... If all life in Earth came from Lilith, did also animals and plants turned to LCL?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jun 23, 2004 7:44 pm No. All human life came from Lilith and the black moon when she seperated from Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jun 23, 2004 7:47 pm then where did plants and animals come from?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:19 pm In the series is stated that LCL was the primordial soup, in wich all life was created. All life evolved from the LCL. And that thing saying that Lilith and Adam were joined as one is a false rumour. They were never together.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:27 pm Hunter21 wrote: I can see both sides of those answers, but I am a little intrigued with EVA Monkey's idea of them being remaining angles.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:31 pm Nephilim wrote: In the series is stated that LCL was the primordial soup, in wich all life was created. All life evolved from the LCL. And that thing saying that Lilith and Adam were joined as one is a false rumour. They were never together.

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:33 pm Personally I think the entire world is effected by the destruction. If you look at the actual symbolism in the end of eva, you see that Shinji is Adam, Asuka is Eve, and Rei is Lilith. Now if that is the case, then Shinji and Asuka are supposed to be the first humans as it says in the bible. So essentially the world is recreated, so I think that the rest of the world is destroyed and transformed into LCL. This also would mean that Shinji and Asuka are in Eden...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:41 pm Crazyman42 wrote: Personally I think the entire world is effected by the destruction. If you look at the actual symbolism in the end of eva, you see that Shinji is Adam, Asuka is Eve, and Rei is Lilith. Now if that is the case, then Shinji and Asuka are supposed to be the first humans as it says in the bible. So essentially the world is recreated, so I think that the rest of the world is destroyed and transformed into LCL. This also would mean that Shinji and Asuka are in Eden...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Guy » Wed Jun 23, 2004 8:45 pm Dave wrote: No. All human life came from Lilith and the black moon when she seperated from Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jun 23, 2004 9:09 pm I think the ending was left so that you could interpret it a couple different ways. The Adam and Eve idea has some credit in that to bring those who wish to come back they may have to be reborn, hence this is why Shinji needed Asuka in the end. Or people who wish to return could return slowly or already be back, just in another area outside of the 3rd impact zone. By not clearly explanning what is really happening, Anno and crew left themselves with a loophole with a couple possible directions in case they ever wanted to pick the series back up.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jun 24, 2004 9:09 am I'm sorry if i over looked someones answer, but where did plants and animals come from?

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Thu Jun 24, 2004 8:45 pm Phaze wrote: Crazyman42 wrote: Personally I think the entire world is effected by the destruction. If you look at the actual symbolism in the end of eva, you see that Shinji is Adam, Asuka is Eve, and Rei is Lilith. Now if that is the case, then Shinji and Asuka are supposed to be the first humans as it says in the bible. So essentially the world is recreated, so I think that the rest of the world is destroyed and transformed into LCL. This also would mean that Shinji and Asuka are in Eden...
